settings.title: Workspace Settings
settings.subtitle: Tune the shell, editor, and runtime defaults
settings.description: The interface supports both dark and light shells, while Monaco keeps its own theme pipeline for code editing. Changes are saved automatically.
settings.footer: Settings persist locally across desktop and web sessions.
appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Lingua supports a dark-first shell and a refined light mode without changing your editor runtime settings.
appearance.theme.dark.label: Dark
appearance.theme.dark.description: High-contrast graphite shell for focused coding sessions.
appearance.theme.light.label: Light
appearance.theme.light.description: Warm paper workspace with calmer contrast and stronger daylight readability.
layout.title: Layout
layout.description: Choose how the editor and console share space inside the main workstation.
layout.preset.horizontal.label: Horizontal Split
layout.preset.vertical.label: Vertical Split
layout.preset.editorOnly.label: Editor Only
editor.title: Editor
editor.description: Keep the Monaco surface aligned with how you read code and how aggressively you want automatic safeguards.
editor.theme.label: Editor theme
editor.theme.hint: Controls Monaco only. App shell theme stays independent.
editor.fontFamily.label: Font family
editor.fontFamily.hint: Use a coding typeface that matches your workflow.
editor.fontSize.label: Font size
editor.fontSize.hint: Adjust the editor scale without touching the shell density.
editor.lineNumbers.label: Line numbers
editor.lineNumbers.hint: Keep gutter references visible while editing.
editor.wordWrap.label: Word wrap
editor.wordWrap.hint: Wrap long lines inside the viewport.
editor.minimap.label: Minimap
editor.minimap.hint: Show the code overview strip on the right edge.
editor.loopProtection.label: Loop protection
editor.loopProtection.hint: Stops runaway JS and TS loops before they lock the renderer.
editor.maxIterations.label: Max iterations
editor.maxIterations.hint: Applies to the inline dynamic language runners.
editor.restoreSession.label: Reopen last session
editor.restoreSession.hint: Restore tabs from the previous session on restart.
updates.title: Updates
updates.description: Desktop update status is surfaced here; web builds show capability limits explicitly.
updates.status.label: Status
updates.status.hint: Review the current desktop update state and any runtime messages.
updates.actions.label: Actions
updates.actions.hint: These controls stay disabled when updates are not supported.
plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.description: Local plugin discovery is surfaced as an operational panel rather than a marketplace promise.
plugins.directory.label: Local plugin directory
language.label: Language
language.hint: Choose the display language for the Lingua interface.
toolbar.run.title: Run (Cmd+Enter)
toolbar.run.label: Run
